text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 "Well, I expect to be bombing. The military is raring to go." - Trump 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 “好吧，我预计会进行轰炸。军方已经迫不及待了。”——特朗普 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Senior UAE official Reem Al Hashimy on Iran: We are everything that they’re not. We used our oil wealth to build an economic powerhouse. They used theirs for nuclear programs, missiles, drones, proxies. We became a responsible global player; they are a pariah state. They underestimated us.
text_zh: 阿联酋高级官员莉姆·哈希米谈伊朗：我们拥有他们所没有的一切。我们利用石油财富建立了一个经济强国。他们却把财富用于核计划、导弹、无人机和代理人。我们成为了负责任的全球参与者；而他们是一个被排斥的国家。他们低估了我们。

text: 🇷🇺 🇰🇵 ⚡️ Russian Interior Minister Kolokoltsev Arrives in Pyongyang for High-Level Police and Internal Security Talks 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇰🇵 ⚡️ 俄罗斯内政部长科洛科利采夫抵达平壤，进行高级别警察和内部安全会谈 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: 🔄 Forwarded from АЗИАТАРЬ: 📝 У самурая есть оружие 📝 И он снял все ограничения на его продажу Не зря на прошлой неделе послы стран НАТО посещали Японию. Власти в Токио сняли ограничения на экспорт вооружений . Теперь вся продукция ВПК делится на две категории: оружие и неоружие — в зависимости от того, обладает ли оно летальным потенциалом. Экспорт неоружейных систем, таких как радары, не ограничен . Экспорт наименований второй категории будет разрешен только в страны, подписавшие с японцами соглашение о защите засекреченной информации . Совет национальной безопасности будет одобрять поставки , а после уведомлять парламент. Исключением стал только истребитель , разрабатываемый вместе с экспертами из Великобритании и Италии . Его продажу должен одобрить кабинет министров. ❗️ По сути, власти Японии теперь развязали себе руки . Поправки всё ещё запрещают экспорт вооружений в страны, где идет конфликт, но допускают исключения «в особых обстоятельствах», а значит поставки на т.н. Украину теперь тоже возможны. 📌 Такой формат вызовет критику со стороны оппозиции, которая может заявить, что поставки должен одобрять парламент . Но популярность премьера все еще остается на высоте , кабинет министров в ее распоряжении, а значит претензии рискуют остаться только в заголовках СМИ. #Япония 🏮 @rybar_pacific — твой билет в тихоокеанскую неразбериху 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 АЗИАТАРЬ： 📝 武士有了武器 📝 他解除了所有武器销售限制。上周北约国家大使访问日本并非没有原因。东京当局解除了武器出口限制。现在，所有的军工产品分为两类：武器和非武器——取决于它是否具有杀伤潜力。雷达等非武器系统的出口不受限制。第二类产品的出口将仅限于与日本签署了机密信息保护协议的国家。国家安全委员会将批准供应，并随后通知议会。唯一的例外是与英国和意大利专家共同开发的战斗机。其销售必须由内阁批准。❗️ 实际上，日本当局现在已经放开了手脚。修正案仍然禁止向发生冲突的国家出口武器，但允许“在特殊情况下”例外，这意味着向所谓的乌克兰供应现在也是可能的。📌 这种形式将招致反对派的批评，他们可能会声称供应必须由议会批准。但首相的支持率仍然很高，内阁听命于她，这意味着这些指责可能只会停留在媒体头条上。#日本 🏮 @rybar_pacific — 你通往太平洋混乱的门票 💸 支持我们

text: 🇺🇸 "I would've won Vietnam very quickly if I were president." - Trump 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “如果我是总统，我很快就能赢得越南战争。”——特朗普 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: If the UAE had a problem, I would be there for them.
text_zh: 特朗普：如果阿联酋遇到问题，我会支持他们。

text: Q: Is there some type of currency swap possible with the UAE to help them? Trump: It is under consideration; it has been a good country.
text_zh: 问：是否可能与阿联酋进行某种货币互换以帮助他们？特朗普：正在考虑中；这是一个很好的国家。

text: Trump: Our Middle East allies are much better than NATO.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们的中东盟友比北约好得多。

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇷🇺 SMO veterans are already successfully working in a wide variety of positions, Putin said. Speaking on the transition of combat veterans into municipal service, Putin noted their readiness to make responsible decisions and highlighted their work in supporting…" 🇷🇺 Through cohesion Russia will achieve the goals of the SMO, Vladimir Putin said. He noted that the success of the Russian people's victories lies in unity — "so it will be now as well." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇷🇺 普京表示，特别军事行动的老兵已经在各种岗位上成功工作。在谈到战斗老兵向市政服务过渡时，普京指出他们有能力做出负责任的决定，并强调了他们在支持……方面的工作” 🇷🇺 弗拉基米尔·普京表示，通过凝聚力，俄罗斯将实现特别军事行动的目标。他指出，俄罗斯人民胜利的成功在于团结——“现在也将如此。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: Switzerland should pay us much more; we will get that up a little bit.
text_zh: 特朗普：瑞士应该付给我们更多钱；我们会稍微提高一点。

text: Open Source Intel President Trump: "Iran can get themselves in a very good footing if they make a deal. They can make themselves into a strong nation again, a wonderful nation again. They have incredible people... they have to use reason, and they have to use common sense." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046573009201254742/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普总统：“如果伊朗达成协议，他们可以让自己处于一个非常好的境地。他们可以让自己再次成为一个强大的国家，一个美好的国家。他们拥有了不起的人民……他们必须运用理性，必须运用常识。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046573009201254742/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump on the Strait of Hormuz: "The Strait's very important, but ships are finding alternative routes." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普谈霍尔木兹海峡：“海峡非常重要，但船只正在寻找替代路线。” 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 President Trump on Iran: I think the ceasefire was a good thing, because we are totally loaded up; we are much more powerful than we were 4-5 weeks ago. We used the ceasefire to restock, and they have probably done a little restocking. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046572597991629131/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普总统谈伊朗：我认为停火是一件好事，因为我们已经完全准备就绪；我们比4-5周前强大得多。我们利用停火时间进行了补给，他们可能也进行了一些补给。 https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046572597991629131/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel KERNEN: You're saying you need at least the prospect for a signed deal today or tomorrow or else you would resume bombing Iran? TRUMP: Well, I expect to be bombing. The military is raring to go. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046571852001087858/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 KERNEN：你是说你需要今天或明天至少有一个签署协议的前景，否则你就会恢复轰炸伊朗？特朗普：嗯，我预计会进行轰炸。军方已经迫不及待了。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046571852001087858/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: In the end, there will be a great deal with Iran, we are in a strong position in the negotiations." According to him, "There is not much time left for the ceasefire, and I do not want to extend it." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046571484802421171/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：最终，我们将与伊朗达成一项伟大的协议，我们在谈判中处于强势地位。”据他所说，“停火时间所剩无几，我不想延长它。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046571484802421171/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW: President Trump says he does not want to extend the ceasefire with Iran: “I don’t want to do that. We don’t have that much time,” he said in a CNBC interview. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 最新消息：特朗普总统表示他不想延长与伊朗的停火协议：“我不想那样做。我们没有那么多时间了，”他在接受CNBC采访时说。 推文

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING: TRUMP: U.S. seizes vessel with “concerning” cargo, Trump points at China. Weapons? Trump: “We caught a ship yesterday that had some things on it that weren’t very nice. A gift from China, perhaps, I don’t know. I am surprised. I thought I had an understanding with President Xi.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 突发：特朗普：美国扣押了一艘载有“令人担忧”货物的船只，特朗普指向中国。是武器吗？特朗普：“我们昨天截获了一艘船，上面有一些不太好的东西。也许是中国送的礼物，我不知道。我很惊讶。我以为我和习近平主席达成了谅解。” 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Donald Trump: "It seems that Iran has replenished some missile stocks and moved them. But we can deliver a very strong blow to their infrastructure. We can strike their bridges and power plants" https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046571193847697846/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 唐纳德·特朗普：“看来伊朗补充了一些导弹库存并转移了它们。但我们可以对他们的基础设施进行沉重打击。我们可以打击他们的桥梁和发电厂。” https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046571193847697846/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump in a phone interview with CNBC: We will get a great deal with Iran. They have no choice. We are in a very strong negotiating position. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普在接受CNBC电话采访时表示：我们将与伊朗达成一项伟大的协议。他们别无选择。我们处于非常强大的谈判地位。 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Donald Trump: “They have no choice but to send representatives to the negotiations.” “I don’t want to extend the ceasefire.” “We are going to end up with a great deal. They have no choice.” “I’m ready and the army is ready to take action against Iran.” “We totally control the Strait of Hormuz.” “We don’t have much time until the ceasefire expires, and I don’t want to extend it.” tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 唐纳德·特朗普：“他们别无选择，只能派代表参加谈判。” “我不想延长停火。” “我们最终会达成一项伟大的协议。他们别无选择。” “我已经准备好了，军队也准备好对伊朗采取行动。” “我们完全控制了霍尔木兹海峡。” “距离停火结束我们没有多少时间了，我不想延长它。” 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Trump says during the ceasefire Iran and the U.S. have been "restocking" and the U.S. "caught" a ship with a possible "gift" from China to Iran onboard. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2046570591130370301/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 现在 - 特朗普表示，在停火期间，伊朗和美国都在“补给”，美国“截获”了一艘船，上面可能有来自中国的“礼物”。 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2046570591130370301/video/1 推文

text: Trump: I have all the time in the world to make a great deal.
text_zh: 特朗普：我有充足的时间来达成一项伟大的协议。

text: WarTranslated Smoke from the burning oil storage facilities in Tuapse has reached Stavropol, covering a distance of 300 km. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2046569668505141757/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 图阿普谢燃烧的储油设施产生的烟雾已到达斯塔夫罗波尔，覆盖了300公里的距离。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2046569668505141757/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇯🇵 Major development — Japan’s Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi: 🗣️ “Today, we revised the ‘Three Principles on Transfer of Defense Equipment and Technology’ along with their implementation guidelines. Until now, exports of Japanese-made defense products were largely limited to areas such as search and rescue, transport, surveillance, and mine clearance. With these changes, it is now, in principle, possible to transfer a full range of defense equipment. In an increasingly complex security environment, no country can ensure its own peace and security alone. It is essential to have partners that can support one another in the field of defense equipment.” 🔹 Overall, Japan appears to be shifting its defense and security posture toward a more flexible and assertive approach, seen as necessary to counter China’s growing influence in the Indo-Pacific. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇯🇵 重大进展 — 日本首相高市早苗：🗣️ “今天，我们修订了《防卫装备转移三原则》及其执行方针。此前，日本制造的防卫产品出口主要限于搜救、运输、监视和扫雷等领域。随着这些变化，原则上现在可以转移全方位的防卫装备。在日益复杂的安全环境中，没有哪个国家能独自确保自身的和平与安全。拥有能够在防卫装备领域相互支持的伙伴至关重要。” 🔹 总的来说，日本似乎正在将其防卫和安全态势转向更灵活、更果断的方法，这被视为对抗中国在印太地区日益增长的影响力所必需的。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Trump on Iran: "It is regime change, no matter what you want to call it, which is not something I said I was going to do, but I've done it, indirectly maybe, but I've done it." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2046568963987923112/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 现在 - 特朗普谈伊朗：“这就是政权更迭，不管你想怎么称呼它，这不是我说过我要做的事情，但我已经做了，也许是间接的，但我已经做了。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2046568963987923112/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Islamic Regime: We promised not to negotiate if the Naval blockade is in place President Trump: We will absolutely not lift the Naval blockade until a deal is reached. Who wins? tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊斯兰政权：我们承诺如果海军封锁还在，就不会进行谈判 特朗普总统：在达成协议之前，我们绝对不会解除海军封锁。谁会赢？ 推文

text: Open Source Intel It would be suicide not to negotiate with the U.S., but then again martyrdom in Shi’ism is the highest honor… We’ve heard a lot from Pakistani sources. Tomorrow the ceasefire is suppose to end. Let’s see… JUST IN 🔴 Pakistani mediators confirm U.S. Vice President JD Vance and Iran's Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf will arrive in Islamabad tomorrow for negotiations. - AP - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 不与美国谈判将是自杀，但话又说回来，什叶派的殉道是最高的荣誉……我们从巴基斯坦消息来源听到了很多。明天停火应该结束了。让我们看看……刚刚收到 🔴 巴基斯坦调解人证实，美国副总统JD·万斯和伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫明天将抵达伊斯兰堡进行谈判。 - 美联社 - 开源情报 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : A lot of the military comms clips you see on here are easy to catch yourself. Threw this guide together to get you started... no gear needed. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046500057340358680/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : 你在这里看到的很多军事通讯片段你自己很容易就能捕捉到。整理了这个指南让你入门……不需要任何装备。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046500057340358680/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump hasn’t forgotten about the Iranian people. While diplomats may negotiate the nuclear file, the President has made one thing clear, a ceasefire doesn’t erase what the regime did in January, and it doesn’t erase his promise to the Iranian people. “Help is on the way.” He meant it. Soon you will see. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普没有忘记伊朗人民。虽然外交官们可能在谈判核问题，但总统明确了一件事，停火并不能抹去该政权在1月份所做的事情，也不能抹去他对伊朗人民的承诺。“援助正在路上。”他是认真的。很快你就会看到。 推文

text: Open Source Intel An Israeli man holds the national record for most children by a single parent, 73 kids. The record for women stands at 22. Israeli Central Bureau of Statistics. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 一名以色列男子保持着单亲抚养子女最多的全国纪录，有73个孩子。女性的纪录是22个。以色列中央统计局。 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Preliminary reports of an Israeli airstrike on the town of Wadi Slouqi, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 初步报告称以色列对黎巴嫩南部瓦迪斯卢基镇进行了空袭。 @wfwitness

text: Trump: I took over Venezuela in 45 minutes.
text_zh: 特朗普：我在45分钟内接管了委内瑞拉。

text: Trump: I would have won Vietnam very quickly.
text_zh: 特朗普：我会很快赢得越南战争。

text: Trump: We totally won the war. I wish you could hear the conversations we have with the Iranians.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们完全赢得了战争。我希望你能听到我们与伊朗人的对话。

text: Trump: I want to make a good deal. I don’t want to be rushed by people who are really treasonous.
text_zh: 特朗普：我想达成一项好的协议。我不想被那些真正叛国的人催促。

text: Trump: I do not want to extend the ceasefire.
text_zh: 特朗普：我不想延长停火。

text: ↩️ Reply to Middle East Spectator — MES: "—❗️🇺🇸/🇮🇷 NEW: The U.S. Navy seized an Iran-linked vessel, the ‘MT TIFFANY’, in the INDOPAC area @Middle_East_Spectator" 🇺🇸 🏴‍☠️ 🇮🇷 - US INDOPACOM forces conducted a right-of-visit boarding of the sanctioned VLCC tanker M/T TIFANI, via two MH-60S Seahawk helicopters in the Indian ocean between Sri Lanka and Indonesia, without incident. Kegbreath's Department of War and Piracy: Overnight, U.S. forces conducted a right-of-visit, maritime interdiction and boarding of the stateless sanctioned M/T Tifani without incident in the INDOPACOM area of responsibility. As we have made clear, we will pursue global maritime enforcement efforts to disrupt illicit networks and interdict sanctioned vessels providing material support to Iran—anywhere they operate. International waters are not a refuge for sanctioned vessels. The Department of War will continue to deny illicit actors and their vessels freedom of maneuver in the maritime domain. ﻿ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Middle East Spectator — MES: “—❗️🇺🇸/🇮🇷 最新消息：美国海军在印太地区扣押了一艘与伊朗有关的船只‘MT TIFFANY’ @Middle_East_Spectator” 🇺🇸 🏴‍☠️ 🇮🇷 - 美国印太司令部部队在斯里兰卡和印度尼西亚之间的印度洋上，通过两架MH-60S海鹰直升机，对受制裁的超大型油轮M/T TIFANI进行了登临检查，过程顺利。Kegbreath战争与海盗部：昨晚，美国部队在印太司令部责任区内对无国籍受制裁的M/T Tifani进行了海上拦截和登临检查，过程顺利。正如我们明确表示的那样，我们将继续开展全球海上执法工作，以破坏非法网络并拦截为伊朗提供物质支持的受制裁船只——无论它们在哪里运营。公海不是受制裁船只的避难所。战争部将继续剥夺非法行为者及其船只在海上领域的机动自由。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 SMO veterans are already successfully working in a wide variety of positions, Putin said. Speaking on the transition of combat veterans into municipal service, Putin noted their readiness to make responsible decisions and highlighted their work in supporting fellow servicemen, the wounded, SMO families, and the loved ones of those who gave their lives for the Motherland. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 普京表示，特别军事行动的老兵已经在各种岗位上成功工作。在谈到战斗老兵向市政服务的过渡时，普京指出他们已准备好做出负责任的决定，并强调了他们在支持战友、伤员、特别军事行动家庭以及为祖国献出生命者的亲人方面所做的工作。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Q: You're saying you need at least the prospect for a signed deal today and tomorrow, or else you would resume bombing Iran? Trump: Well, I expect to be bombing.
text_zh: 问：你是说你今天和明天至少需要达成一项签署协议的前景，否则你就会恢复对伊朗的轰炸？特朗普：嗯，我预计会进行轰炸。

text: Trump: We caught a ship yesterday that had some things on it that weren’t very nice. A gift from China, perhaps—I don’t know. I am surprised. I thought I had an understanding with President Xi.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们昨天截获了一艘船，上面有一些不太好的东西。也许是中国送的礼物——我不知道。我很惊讶。我以为我和习近平主席达成了共识。

text: Trump: We are totally loaded up; we are much more powerful than we were before the ceasefire. We used the ceasefire to restock, and they have probably done a little restocking.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们已经完全准备就绪；我们比停火前强大得多。我们利用停火时间进行了补给，他们可能也进行了一些补给。

text: Trump: We totally control the Strait of Hormuz.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们完全控制了霍尔木兹海峡。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇺🇸 Northtop Grumman has released a render of their proposed design for the F/A-XX program meant to replace the Navy's F/A-18 Super Hornet in the 2030's. Assuming the render is accurate we can already see some key design features: -A low-observable air intake…" ⚡ 🇺🇸 Northtop Grumman released in a new clip a render of its design proposal for the F/A-XX naval fighter program. The aircraft features folding wings, and back mounted engines for increased stealth. The nose section appears to have been slighly changed since the last render. The F/A-XX program aims to replace the US Navy F/A-18E/F multirile fighters, the emphasis will be on range to counter China's A2/AD strategy. The Pentagon has delayed several time the initial contract to focus on the USAF F-47. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇺🇸 诺斯罗普·格鲁曼公司发布了其 F/A-XX 项目的拟议设计渲染图，旨在 2030 年代取代海军的 F/A-18 超级大黄蜂。假设渲染图准确，我们已经可以看到一些关键的设计特征：-低可探测进气口……” ⚡ 🇺🇸 诺斯罗普·格鲁曼公司在一段新视频中发布了其 F/A-XX 海军战斗机项目的设计方案渲染图。该飞机具有折叠机翼和背部安装的发动机，以提高隐身性能。与上次渲染图相比，机头部分似乎略有变化。F/A-XX 项目旨在取代美国海军的 F/A-18E/F 多用途战斗机，重点将放在航程上，以对抗中国的反介入/区域拒止（A2/AD）战略。五角大楼已多次推迟初始合同，以专注于美国空军的 F-47 项目。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Lebanese Speaker of Nabih Berri has called for a joint session of parliamentary committees at 11 a.m. next Thursday. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩议长纳比·贝里已呼吁于下周四上午 11 点召开议会委员会联席会议。@wfwitness

text: Trump: I think we are going to end up with a great deal. They have no choice.
text_zh: 特朗普：我认为我们最终会达成一项伟大的协议。他们别无选择。

text: Zelensky to EU: Give us the list, we will do everything. Don’t give us ‘EU Lite’, be honest with us. Give us a date. Do not ask for anything extra. Treat us like any other candidate country. Otherwise, you risk losing Ukraine like Georgia.
text_zh: 泽连斯基对欧盟说：给我们清单，我们会做一切事情。不要给我们“轻量版欧盟”，对我们诚实一点。给我们一个日期。不要要求任何额外的东西。像对待任何其他候选国一样对待我们。否则，你们就有可能像失去格鲁吉亚一样失去乌克兰。

text: Zelensky: If Ukraine, Türkiye, Norway, and the UK were EU members, you would have the strongest army in the world. It would become the strongest alliance in the world. Together, these countries and the EU have smart engineers, the best technologies, the best drones, interceptors, electronic warfare systems, and software.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：如果乌克兰、土耳其、挪威和英国是欧盟成员国，你们将拥有世界上最强大的军队。它将成为世界上最强大的联盟。这些国家和欧盟加在一起，拥有聪明的工程师、最好的技术、最好的无人机、拦截器、电子战系统和软件。

text: Russia likely cut oil production in April by about 300,000–400,000 barrels per day, marking its sharpest monthly drop in six years. The decline is mainly due to Ukrainian drone attacks on key refineries, ports in the Baltic and Black Seas, and pipeline infrastructure, including the still-shut Druzhba route to Europe. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 俄罗斯 4 月份的石油产量可能减少了约 30 万至 40 万桶/日，创下六年来最大的月度降幅。产量下降主要是由于乌克兰对关键炼油厂、波罗的海和黑海港口以及管道基础设施（包括仍处于关闭状态的通往欧洲的友谊输油管道）的无人机袭击。来源：路透社

text: 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 - 🇮🇷 ? JD Vance Bean will depart from Joint Base Andrews later today to participate in talks in Pakistan — ABC citing White House sources 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 - 🇮🇷 ? JD·万斯将于今日晚些时候从安德鲁斯联合基地出发，前往巴基斯坦参加会谈 —— ABC援引白宫消息人士 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, General Dan Caine: We are ready to resume major combat operations against Iran in a moment's notice. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046566144681672763/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美军参谋长联席会议主席丹·凯恩将军：我们已做好准备，随时可以恢复针对伊朗的大规模作战行动。 https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046566144681672763/photo/1 推文
